content: Check that all exported functions have complete documentation (@title, @param, @return, @examples, @export)
Verify S4 classes and methods are properly documented
Verify examples run without errors and use appropriate tags (@donttest, @dontrun, @dontshow)
Check DESCRIPTION file for CRAN compliance
Run devtools::check(cran = TRUE) and address any issues
Verify all internal functions use @noRd or @keywords internal appropriately
Add @examples sections to 8 functions missing them
Update DESCRIPTION file for CRAN compliance (Title case, expand Description)
Replace all @dontrun with @donttest and ensure examples can actually run
